title: Plectronia arborea
taxonomy: Plectronia arborea is classified in the kingdom Plantae, with its family being Rubiaceae. The genus Plectronia belongs to the family Rubiaceae. The species Plectronia arborea is further divided into various subspecies based on its geographical distribution and morphological characteristics. Plectronia arborea is native to tropical regions of Asia, with its classification indicating its close relation to other plants in the same family. It is also known to be a part of the Rubiales order in the angiosperm classification.
uses: Plectronia arborea is used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world. The plant has been found to possess antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties.
